---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the reusable automation workflow
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Constraints

List platform or tooling limits, such as macOS-only behavior or WeChat DevTools restrictions.

## Privacy check

Confirm the proposal does not require embedding private project identifiers.
